title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 141.1015 - Power of eminent domain or to tax not authorized
text:
141.1015.  Power of eminent domain or to tax not authorized. — A land bank agency shall neither possess nor exercise the power of eminent domain.  A land bank agency shall not have the power to tax.
(L. 2012 H.B. 1659 & 1116)
